Interface StatusProtoOrBuilder

All Superinterfaces:
MessageLiteOrBuilder, MessageOrBuilder
All Known Implementing Classes:
StatusProto, StatusProto.Builder
@Generated public interface StatusProtoOrBuilder extends MessageOrBuilder
